metadata.description: Jesse Jolly's agentic engineering harness for Claude Code: the control system around coding agents that ships and operates production software.

plugins.name: agentic-harness
plugins.description: Durable context (a memory bank), one-orchestrator sub-agent discipline, verify-against-canonical-source gates, and a clean key-free MCP loadout. Installs sub-agents, skills, an MCP set, and a /harness-init scaffolder into your Claude Code. Fully customizable.
